summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a legendary show with a psychedelic second set, highlighted by an epic Playin' In The Band and stellar Black Peter solo.
review: Fans rave about this performance as one of the all‑time greats – the second set is called “psychedelic perfection,” featuring what many deem the best ever Playin' In The Band, a moving Black Peter solo, an unforgettable Terrapin Station, and a ripping Promised Land. The soundboard source is praised for being brighter, cleaner and even better than the official Road Trips release.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both musical performance (standout songs, energetic second set) and recording quality (brighter, cleaner than official release).

recording_quality.technical_notes: Brighter and cleaner than the Road Trips official release; no reported drop‑outs or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as psychedelic perfection with seamless, high‑energy transitions; overall show considered a fan favorite.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for ripping on The Promised Land and delivering an epic Playin' In The Band.
band_member_comments.Phil: Highlighted for ripping alongside Jerry on The Promised Land.
